Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Tartarus steel]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Tartarus steel is a material used to make Indirial's war-hammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Tartarus steel is all but unbreakable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Tartarus steel is used to make summoning keys for Tartarus Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Tartarus steel is a type of blade material.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Tartarus steel is mirror-bright.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Tartarus steel is used to make a soldier's shining sword.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Tartarus steel is a material used to cover a giant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Indirial is working with a pile of Tartarus steel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Erastes holds a Tartarus steel infantry sword.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
